overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring wet neon-lit streets, towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards, and futuristic vehicles. The player navigates covered walkways, crosses wide intersections, and passes distinctive landmarks including a spiral neon tower and a police officer.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon underglow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk observing the spiral tower and neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: tall cylindrical megabuilding with red and white spiral neon rings and multiple digital screens
building facade with vibrant purple neon trim and overhead covering
black metal railing separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle lanes
large cylindrical rotating advertisement display with multiple faces
cyan illuminated bench with sleek curved design

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath a purple neon-lit building facade. The iconic spiral neon tower dominates the center view in the distance, while digital billboards and futuristic benches line the walkway. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with full sky visibility
turns right to cross street while looking up at surrounding skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: turning right onto the crosswalk and walking across the intersection while looking up at the spiral tower

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold diagonal yellow and black stripes
red traffic light suspended on horizontal pole over intersection
massive dark glass building with grid pattern windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into an open intersection. The camera turns right to cross the wide street marked with yellow stripes, passing under a red traffic light. The spiral tower remains visible to the left while a massive dark skyscraper rises on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with police presence and moving traffic

events.description: futuristic purple sports car drives past on the right side
approaching police officer standing on the street corner ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection through moderate traffic, approaching a police officer on the far corner

notable_agents.action: police officer in black tactical uniform with blue accents standing on sidewalk corner observing traffic
futuristic purple sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: NCPD officer in dark uniform with glowing blue patches standing guard
small rectangular orange structure on street median
building facade covered with multiple layered digital advertising screens

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide intersection with moderate traffic including futuristic sports cars. A police officer stands prominently on the right corner as the camera approaches. The spiral tower disappears behind as the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with giant vertical billboards and elevated highway

events.description: turns corner onto new street dominated by large advertising billboards
passing massive yellow billboard with smiling face and 'enjoy!' text

agents.ego_description: walking down the street observing giant digital billboards and futuristic architecture

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying smiling face with 'enjoy!' text in green
massive concrete highway structure with steam rising from vents
tall structure with multiple stacked digital screens showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: Turning onto a commercial street lined with massive digital billboards. The iconic yellow 'enjoy!' billboard dominates the right side while an elevated highway ramp looms ahead. The environment shifts from the open intersection to a canyon of advertisements and towering structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: crosswalk leading to palm-lined commercial sidewalk

events.description: crossing street at crosswalk with illuminated walk signal
steps onto sidewalk with neon shop fronts and row of palm trees

agents.ego_description: crossing the final intersection and continuing along the sidewalk with shops and palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: storefronts with glowing neon signs and metal security shutters
pedestrian signal box displaying yellow walk symbol
tall palm trees lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Crossing the final street at a marked crosswalk, passing a pedestrian signal box. The camera moves onto a sidewalk lined with palm trees and neon-lit shop fronts, leaving the massive billboards behind. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered neon walkway through a bustling urban intersection and into a dense canyon of digital advertisements. It begins beneath a purple neon facade on a covered sidewalk, moving toward a distant spiral tower while vibrant lights reflect off the wet pavement. As the camera emerges from the shelter, it turns right to cross a wide, yellow-striped intersection, passing a red traffic light and a police officer while the spiral tower recedes into the background. The scene then shifts into a commercial corridor dominated by massive digital billboards, including a prominent yellow enjoy sign, before moving under an elevated highway ramp. Finally, the camera crosses a marked pedestrian walk to reach a sidewalk lined with palm trees and neon shop fronts, leaving the towering advertisements behind.
